overall.description: Cinematic game footage of a medieval great hall filled with students dining at long tables, illuminated by golden sunlight streaming through tall stained glass windows and hundreds of floating candles overhead. The scene depicts a magical school dining hall with Gothic stone architecture and dense crowds of robed students.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with house dining tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of the hall observing the students dining and conversing at the house tables

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes eating meals and talking at long wooden tables

entered.detail: tall ornate Gothic windows with colorful panes casting patterned light onto the floor
hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air beneath the vaulted ceiling
lengthy wooden house tables lined with food, plates, and dining students
Gothic stone walls with arched doorways and medieval masonry
high arched wooden ceiling beams disappearing into shadow above the candles

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a magical great hall filled with dining students. Golden sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows on the left, illuminating the stone floor and wooden tables where students in robes eat and converse. Hundreds of floating candles hang from the high vaulted ceiling, providing warm ambient light to the Gothic stone hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a magical great hall where golden sunlight and floating candlelight converge to illuminate a bustling student gathering. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the Gothic stone architecture, focusing on the interplay between the high vaulted ceiling and the stone floor below. As the eye wanders through the space, the warm ambient light from hundreds of floating candles blends with the brilliant beams streaming through tall stained glass windows on the left. The scene then settles on the long wooden tables, where robed students eat and converse in the soft, golden glow of the hall.
